title: ericameria linearifolia
intro: Ericameria linearifolia, also known as San Diego golden bush or linearleaf goldenrod, is a shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Ericameria linearifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
